pi_items.source: Task specification; verified against Magento 2 documentation showing product name is required field and supports up to 255 characters (https://docs.magento.com/user-guide/catalog/product-create-simple.html)

Task specification; verified against Magento 2 SKU requirements: max 64 characters, alphanumeric characters and hyphens allowed, format consistent with best practices (https://www.mageplaza.com/kb/how-to-generate-config-sku.html, https://belvg.com/blog/what-is-sku-number-in-magento-and-how-to-generate-it.html)

Task specification; verified as realistic retail price for quality cotton t-shirt. Industry benchmarks show recommended retail price range of $24.99-$30.99 for cotton t-shirts (https://printify.com/blog/t-shirt-pricing/, https://www.realthread.com/blog/pricing-protips-a-guide-to-pricing-your-tshirts-for-retail)

Task specification; verified as reasonable stock quantity for a simple product in a test/demonstration environment. Magento 2 supports inventory tracking for simple products (https://store.magenest.com/blog/get-product-stock-magento-2/)

Task specification; verified as appropriate product category for a t-shirt in an ecommerce context. Magento 2 supports product categorization (https://docs.magento.com/user-guide/catalog/product-create-simple.html)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a simple product in Magento with the following verified specifications: Product name 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (valid name, 25 characters), SKU 'OCT-001' (valid format, 7 characters, within 64-character max), price $29.99 (realistic for quality cotton t-shirt, within industry range of $24.99-$30.99), stock quantity 100 (reasonable for demo environment), and category 'Clothing' (appropriate for t-shirt). These are task specification requirements, not data pulled from an external source. All values are internally consistent and comply with Magento 2 product creation requirements which mandate product name, SKU, and price as the three required fields.
